title: Mini Strawberry Cakes
description: Change that boring vanilla cake into 3 good-looking mini strawberry cakes!
body:
# Mini Strawberry Cakes
Convert the vanilla cake to 3 "Mini" Strawberry cakes. 

![Cake item and block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e205bc1d6bd281b89645f469045900d0ba7fea7f.png))
